description: Borderline cases: Environmental loss ratio just touching target (not breaching), Cyber hit rate drops 12pp (below 15pp threshold). Tests that the pipeline correctly does NOT fire signals that don't meet thresholds, and the LLM doesn't hallucinate concerns from marginal data.

Environmental.note: Loss ratio reaches exactly 0.55 (target) by week 9 — should NOT trigger S3

Cyber.note: Hit rate drops 12pp — below the 15pp absolute threshold — should NOT trigger S2

ground_truth.eval_notes: Primary test: pipeline silence when thresholds not met. LLM must not over-interpret marginal data as concerns.
